GET IN TOUCH · LAWNTON, QLD

DROP US
A LINE

Question, support, or just want to chat about where you're at? Our coaches are standing by. Call, email, swing by — or send a message below and we'll get back fast.

SEND US A MESSAGE

Whether you have a question, need support, or just want to chat about where you're at — we're here to listen.

Secure form · We reply within 1 business day

WHAT LOCALS SAY

TRUST BUILT ONE SESSION AT A TIME

Google Reviews
Knight Fitness Lawnton
5.0
Based on 350+ reviews
S
Sarah McKenzie
Local Guide · 42 reviews
★★★★★2 weeks ago

Weekly check-ins were the missing piece for me — finally a gym that actually keeps you accountable, not just a workout and goodbye. Down 12kg in 4 months and feel better than I have in years.

J
James Hartley
7 reviews
★★★★★1 month ago

Joined Men's Club at 42. Stronger than I've been in 20 years, back pain gone. Best money I've ever spent on my health. The coaches actually know what they're doing.

L
Lisa Kowalski
Local Guide · 128 reviews
★★★★★1 month ago

After 10 years of starting and stopping every January, I'm finally consistent. Haven't missed a week in five months. The community here is what keeps you walking back through the door.

M
Mick Thompson
3 reviews
★★★★★2 months ago

Hadn't trained in 8 years. Walked in nervous. Walked out part of the crew. These blokes got me back in shape without any judgement. Absolute legends.

E
Em Richardson
19 reviews
★★★★★3 months ago

Tried every gym in Pine Rivers. This is the only one I've stuck with. Coaches know my name, my goals, my injuries. It's a proper community, not a card-swipe gym.

D
Dave Patterson
Local Guide · 64 reviews
★★★★★4 months ago

20kg down in a year. The accountability is what made it stick this time. Highly recommend if you've tried gyms before and given up — this place is different.
